name: 消费者 / Predator Strike
description: 首次在对手合作时选择背叛并获得奖励分数。 / Defect against a cooperating opponent for the first time and earn a reward score.

name: 你的名字是？ / Peacekeeper
description: 首次在双方合作对局中选择合作并获得奖励分数。 / Cooperate in a fully cooperative match for the first time and earn a reward score.

name: 三度背叛 / Sanbing
description: 连续三次被背叛失去分数 / Defect three times in a row and lose score.

name: 混沌演说家 / Chaos Orator
description: 成功提交一次有效的混沌发言，并在下一轮中获得奖励分数。 / Submit a valid Chaos Speaker speech and earn a reward score in the next round and earn a reward score.

name: 圣人 / Saint
description: 连续五次合作并获得奖励分数。 / Cooperate five times in a row and earn a reward score.

name: 正义的伙伴 / Seigi no Mikata
description: 背叛一个在上一轮背叛过别人的玩家，并获得奖励分数。 / Defect a player who betrayed others in the previous round and earn a reward score.
